nasb.text: and say, ‘Hear the word of the Lord, O king of Judah, who sits on David’s throne, you and your servants and your people who enter these gates.

esv.text: and say, ‘Hear the word of the Lord, O king of Judah, who sits on the throne of David, you, and your servants, and your people who enter these gates.

cnv.text: 說：‘坐大衛王位的猶大王啊！你和你的臣僕，以及從這些門進來的人民，都要聽耶和華的話。

ccb.text: ‘坐在大卫宝座上的犹大王啊，你和你的臣仆以及进出这城门的百姓都要听耶和华的话。
